title: Corporate A/G Research Extension
subtitle: A public SEC filings study of structural distress and corporate deterioration regimes.
status: Research-grade — not production — weaker than banking
final_classification: LOCKED / research-grade extension / not production / weaker than banking / worth preserving

dataset.universe: eligible SEC non-financial operating companies under project filters

primary_full_population_screen.role: broad structural Ch.11 screening on the eligible public-company universe

divergence_masking_diagnostic.role: diagnostic for the divergence regime; chance for broad Ch.11 screening

stronger_than_composite_on_AUROC: Operating cash flow / assets (single primitive; AUROC 0.736)
doctrine_summary.composite_added_value: interpretive architecture and robustness, not maximum AUROC
doctrine_summary.comparison_to_banking: research-grade extension; weaker than banking; banking remains flagship

allowed_claim_summary: eligible SEC non-financial operating-company universe under project filters
Watch band (80–95th percentile of structural distress) is the most informative monitoring tier
canonical R retained for divergence/masking with first internal evidence; external validation pending
forbidden_claim_summary: top bankruptcy risks / highest-risk companies / likely to fail
the A/G composite improves on simple financial primitives (it does not, on this data)
top-1% structural-distress flags are highest-priority (tail dropoff)
canonical R is validated (only first internal evidence)
